Who We Are

Bangladesh's Trusted Sourcing Partner

“Reliability, transparency, and timely execution — at every step.”

Royan Apparels is a trusted knit garment sourcing and manufacturing partner based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. We work closely with a network of compliant factories to deliver quality products tailored to our buyers' requirements.

From order placement to final shipment, we ensure reliability, transparency, and timely execution at every stage of your order.

01
Our Vision
A Global Benchmark

To establish Royan Apparels as a benchmark in knit garment sourcing from Bangladesh, known for quality excellence, compliance, ethical manufacturing, and consistent performance in the global apparel supply chain.

02
Our Mission
Quality at Every Stage

To work closely with audited manufacturing partners to deliver high-quality knit garments while ensuring compliance, continuous quality monitoring, timely execution, and complete customer satisfaction.

Ayan Roy Antu
Founder & Managing Director
Our Founder

Built by Expertise, Driven by Trust

Ayan Roy Antu combines technical education with real-world manufacturing experience. He completed his BSc in Textile Engineering from BGMEA University of Fashion & Technology (BUFT), gaining deep knowledge of fabrics, garment construction, and production systems.

His professional exposure began with an internship at Ha-Meem Group, one of Bangladesh's largest garment conglomerates, where he developed a strong understanding of knit garment production and operational discipline. As a former Club Executive of the BUFT Textile Club, he further honed his leadership skills.

With over five years of hands-on experience in critical knitwear manufacturing, he founded Royan Apparels with a commitment to transparency, quality, and lasting buyer partnerships.

BSc Textile Engineering BUFT Graduate Ha-Meem Group Alumni BUFT Textile Club Exec 5+ Years Knitwear

What We Do

End-to-End Garment Solutions

From first sample to final shipment — full accountability and zero surprises at every touchpoint of your order.

01 / 04
Design, Sampling & Development

Full sample development from buyer-provided tech packs, delivered swiftly and accurately to your specifications.

  • Style interpretation from tech packs
  • Knit fabric & trim development
  • Proto, fit, size-set & PP samples
02 / 04
Reliable Knit Manufacturing

A vetted network of fully compliant knit factories with controlled production planning and monitoring.

  • Fully compliant knit garment factories
  • Capacity booking & line allocation
  • Controlled production planning
03 / 04
Quality Management System

Multi-stage quality control aligned to buyer standards and international AQL inspection protocols.

  • Fabric inspection & pre-production checks
  • Inline, final & pre-shipment inspection
  • Buyer standard & AQL compliance
04 / 04
Shipment & Delivery Control

Rigorous monitoring ensures goods depart on schedule, packed exactly to buyer specification.

  • Packing method approval
  • Shipment schedule monitoring
  • On-time delivery assurance
Production Highlights

What We Manufacture

01 / 07

Mens T-Shirts

Classic & graphic tees in cotton and performance knit — the cornerstone of every casual collection.

02 / 07

Drop Shoulder

Oversized drop-shoulder silhouettes crafted for streetwear and contemporary lifestyle brands.

03 / 07

Polo T-Shirts

Pique, ribbed, and striped polo styles with refined collar detailing. Casual to corporate.

04 / 07

Winter Wear

Hoodies, sweatshirts, fleece pullovers, zip-ups, and co-ord sets built for cold-weather lines.

05 / 07

Bottoms & Basics

Track pants, wide-leg trousers, joggers, shorts, tank tops, and essential base layers.

06 / 07

Women's Wear

Long-sleeve tees, sleeveless tops, graphic tees, leggings, and casual dresses for women.

07 / 07

Kids Wear

Co-ord sets, character print tees, dresses, hoodies, and sleeveless tops for children.

Why Royan

What Makes Us Different

Seven reasons why global buyers trust Royan Apparels with their collections.

01
Fast Sampling Support

Quick turnaround for proto, fit, and PP samples to meet buyer timelines without compromising quality.

02
Streetwear Expertise

Specialized in fashion-forward and critical streetwear knit products — graphic tees to co-ord sets.

03
Low MOQ Production

Flexible minimum order quantities enabling startups, new brands, and seasonal test orders to work with us.

04
On-Time Delivery

Strong production planning and factory partnerships ensure shipments consistently depart on schedule.

05
Transparent Costing

Clear, itemised pricing with no hidden costs. Transparency is the foundation of every buyer relationship.

06
Clear Communication

Regular production updates keep buyers fully informed at every stage from order to final shipment.

07
Buyer Satisfaction Focus

Every order handled with deep attention to individual buyer requirements, preferences, and expectations.
